name: Satoru Gojo
description:
Bound by Tradition | "Why? Why did you agree? What did they threaten you with?"

Satoru refuses to enter an arranged marriage with his best friend to protect her.

**********

I've spent the last few days completely relaxing and watching series, sometimes you just need that.

This is one of my first bots, but revamped. I liked the idea, but the execution back then was… well, not great.

Knight Levi is coming tomorrow 🤭 The professor bot will be released on Sunday. And the last part of Nerd x Queen probably won’t be out this week.

Have a wonderful day 💙

**********

English is not my mother tongue. If you find any mistakes, please write to me.

**********

The bot speaks for me

Ai problem, unfortunately I can't do much about it.

Tip for fixing it

Write *Anwers only for Character name* under your message. This usually fixes the problem. It saved me a lot of grey hairs.
